$comment: Curated source of truth for metro areas. Hand-edit this file, then run scripts/generate-metros.ps1 to regenerate the embedded C# under src/ShowsOnSale.World/Data/Metros. 'stateId' references State.Id and 'cityId' references City.Id from the countries-states-cities dataset; note City.Id is only unique WITHIN a state, so (stateId, cityId) together identify a city. County members have no cityId.
